title: 素晴らしき美を維持するために……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are heading back to the
academy. The sun starts to set as the dorm curfew
draws nearer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No! Sweet mother of mercy!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To have forgotten something so vital... This is
most unbecoming of the Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've forgotten an essential piece of the living
masterpiece that is I!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I didn't purchase rose petals to set afloat in the
bathtub!
choice_data_list: It's almost curfew. Can't it wait till tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: NO! With every ounce of my being, no!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What unforgivable folly it would be to
deliberately neglect my radiant shine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now that you understand the direness of my
predicament, you can accompany me to purchase
said roses.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Think of those precious petals, earnestly waiting
to share a frolicking moment with me in the
tub—now wallowing in the despair that I have yet
to claim them.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I must go this instant and rescue them from their
anguish!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Make haste!
choice_data_list: We'll have time if we hurry!
We'll have time if we hurry!
No. It's best for you to follow curfew.
No. It's best for you to follow curfew.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Make haste!
choice_data_list: We'll have time if we hurry!
We'll have time if we hurry!
No. It's best for you to follow curfew.
No. It's best for you to follow curfew.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make her promise she'll return to the academy
by curfew, and we head to her usual shop.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Five minutes before curfew... And the roses are
safely in my loving embrace.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! The Overlord keeps her word! Have I
inspired you once more?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That I am as great and beautiful as I am noble?
Mediocre! Those traits should be more than
obvious to you by this point!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh yes! I should offer my thanks for
accompanying me. Here, a rose for you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Were you aware, Trainer? Roses carry with them
two special meanings...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Keep heart and "you shall return with hope."

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't you agree those words perfectly
describe us this night?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You don't seem so sure. I was certain that
revelation would have you in tears...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gah! Are you implying what I believe you are?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are already content, because the hope
you've gained is no other than I!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Touché, Trainer! You got me that time! Haaah ha
ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With T.M. Opera O in high spirits, I see her off
and return home.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm? What do you mean?
choice_data_list:
Break curfew and you're in for a lecture late
into the night.

Break curfew and you're in for a lecture late
into the night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that no amount of roses will ever make
up for a lack of beauty sleep.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This is terrible!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Alas, I had forgotten something so basic!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Limbs with the sheen of icefish! Skin soft as silk!
The beautiful and handsome Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
All of that preserved through leading a proper
lifestyle, and yet, here I am...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer, for reminding me of this very
important truth.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My heart aches for those poor roses who, alas,
must be left to wait in vain. They shall receive my
full affection tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tonight will be a night to turn in early. That goes
for you as well.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Take this advice from me, as an
expression of my gratitude!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: For I shall meet you in your dreams, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And we will have a dance party, in the rose-filled
courtyard of a beautiful castle beneath the stars!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I imagine the elaborate scene she's described.
Some interesting dreams are bound to visit me
tonight.
